## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory interview between Kyle (fwd.digital) and Andy (potential hire) to discuss a Director role and company growth/challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/_D23-vkLrLxfPUqMWx33yZs9Lza32NvK?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital is experiencing rapid growth (40+ accounts, $6M ARR) and scaling challenges](https://fathom.video/share/_D23-vkLrLxfPUqMWx33yZs9Lza32NvK?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Key needs: capacity planning, tech/product development, strategic support for accounts](https://fathom.video/share/_D23-vkLrLxfPUqMWx33yZs9Lza32NvK?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [Role would involve leading 2-3 pods (\~8 accounts), improving SOPs, and elevating strategy](https://fathom.video/share/_D23-vkLrLxfPUqMWx33yZs9Lza32NvK?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Company culture values curiosity, willingness to learn, and intentional automation](https://fathom.video/share/_D23-vkLrLxfPUqMWx33yZs9Lza32NvK?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)

## Topics

### Company Growth and Challenges

  - [Rapid growth: 15 accounts to 40+, $1.5M to $6M ARR in short time](https://fathom.video/share/_D23-vkLrLxfPUqMWx33yZs9Lza32NvK?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Scaling challenges: capacity planning, resource allocation, SOP development](https://fathom.video/share/_D23-vkLrLxfPUqMWx33yZs9Lza32NvK?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Tech/product development: backlog of enhancements, need for more engineers](https://fathom.video/share/_D23-vkLrLxfPUqMWx33yZs9Lza32NvK?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
  - [Goal: 100+ accounts by year-end, requiring strategic hires and process improvements](https://fathom.video/share/_D23-vkLrLxfPUqMWx33yZs9Lza32NvK?tab=summary&timestamp=1889.0)

### Role Overview and Expectations

  - [Leading 2-3 pods (\~8 accounts total)](https://fathom.video/share/_D23-vkLrLxfPUqMWx33yZs9Lza32NvK?tab=summary&timestamp=2325.0)
  - [4-5 team members per pod: managing editors, account managers, writers](https://fathom.video/share/_D23-vkLrLxfPUqMWx33yZs9Lza32NvK?tab=summary&timestamp=2400.0)
  - [Key responsibilities: SOP development, strategy elevation, relationship building](https://fathom.video/share/_D23-vkLrLxfPUqMWx33yZs9Lza32NvK?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [Success metrics: improving processes, growing/retaining accounts, team development](https://fathom.video/share/_D23-vkLrLxfPUqMWx33yZs9Lza32NvK?tab=summary&timestamp=2001.0)

### Content Strategy and SEO Approach

  - [Focus: right content, right audience, right journey stage](https://fathom.video/share/_D23-vkLrLxfPUqMWx33yZs9Lza32NvK?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Emphasis on useful, helpful content over algorithm optimization](https://fathom.video/share/_D23-vkLrLxfPUqMWx33yZs9Lza32NvK?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
  - [Balancing automation with strategic thinking and creativity](https://fathom.video/share/_D23-vkLrLxfPUqMWx33yZs9Lza32NvK?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [Adapting to industry shifts (e.g., AI content, LLM referrals)](https://fathom.video/share/_D23-vkLrLxfPUqMWx33yZs9Lza32NvK?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)

### Technical SEO and Reporting

  - [Current approach: flagging key issues during onboarding, not typically implementing](https://fathom.video/share/_D23-vkLrLxfPUqMWx33yZs9Lza32NvK?tab=summary&timestamp=2844.0)
  - [Considering dedicated technical SEO team/pod for audits and ongoing monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/_D23-vkLrLxfPUqMWx33yZs9Lza32NvK?tab=summary&timestamp=2861.0)
  - [Need to improve reporting processes and tools (e.g., Looker Studio integration)](https://fathom.video/share/_D23-vkLrLxfPUqMWx33yZs9Lza32NvK?tab=summary&timestamp=2489.0)
  - [Opportunity to develop better tracking for emerging channels (e.g., AI assistants)](https://fathom.video/share/_D23-vkLrLxfPUqMWx33yZs9Lza32NvK?tab=summary&timestamp=2637.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to discuss with team and determine next steps in interview process](https://fathom.video/share/_D23-vkLrLxfPUqMWx33yZs9Lza32NvK?tab=summary&timestamp=3245.0)
  - [Follow up with Andy regarding next stages and any additional information needed](https://fathom.video/share/_D23-vkLrLxfPUqMWx33yZs9Lza32NvK?tab=summary&timestamp=3252.0)
